CustomField.description: Checkout routing mode for the Checkout Cart. One of: Approve, Invoice, Stripe (validated in Apex — Custom Settings cannot hold Picklist fields, so this is stored as Text). Blank defaults to Invoice. Invoice = stamp active + generate a proposal/agreement document; Stripe = paid checkout via DeliveryStripePaymentHandler (seam); Approve = route through the approval rails.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter Approve, Invoice, or Stripe. Blank defaults to Invoice.
CustomField.label: Checkout Mode
